entries.statement: Ability to balance short-term operational data and AI demands against long-term strategic platform investments under resource and organizational constraints.
Ability to prioritize data governance investments across competing data domains and business units with limited resources and uneven organizational maturity.
Ability to distinguish between AI use cases that require formal governance review and those that can proceed under standard operating procedures, calibrating oversight to actual risk.
Ability to sustain governance program momentum in organizations where data governance lacks executive mandate or where business unit resistance is high.
Ability to serve as an effective bridge between business stakeholders who generate and consume data and technical stakeholders who store and process it.
